data.current_summary: Get subscription preferences for a specific contact
data.current_description: Retrieve a contact's current email subscription preferences.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current subscription status and preferences for a specific contact identified by subscriberIdString. Returns a PublicStatus object containing the contact's subscription state across all communication channels and preference settings. This operation requires authentication and returns the contact's complete subscription profile.
data.reasoning: The current description is too narrow (mentions only 'email' when the API context suggests broader communication preferences) and lacks details about the response structure and authentication requirements. The summary is clear and actionable, so no change needed there. Enhanced description clarifies the scope of preferences, specifies the response schema type, and notes authentication requirements for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'post-/communication-preferences/v4/statuses/{subscriberIdString}' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Set the subscription status of a specific contact.
data.description_suggestion: Updates the subscription status and preferences for a specific contact identified by subscriberIdString. Accepts a PartialPublicStatusRequest object containing the subscription preferences to update. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated PublicStatus object reflecting the new subscription state. This operation modifies the contact's communication preferences and may affect future communication delivery.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks critical details about input expectations, response format, and side effects. The summary is clear and actionable, so no change needed. Enhanced description specifies the request schema type, clarifies that partial updates are supported, identifies the response schema, and explicitly notes the side effect of modifying communication preferences. This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and consequences.
